scenarios.description: Calling setTrackPosition(false) on a parser that already has tracking enabled disables position tracking
scenarios.expectedResult: same parser returned and isTrackPosition() is false
pseudocode: TEST TC03 setTrackPosition disable when already enabled

scenarios.description: Chaining calls to setTrackPosition flips from false to true then back to false without new instances
scenarios.precondition: fresh HTML parser with default trackPosition = false
scenarios.expectedResult: same parser instance returned each call; final isTrackPosition() is false
pseudocode: TEST TC04 setTrackPosition chaining on same instance
